content.en:
"It's so simple, a top-level dimensional treasure has been refined?"

Ye Tian also thought it was incredible, even this kind of weapon could be mass-produced, and the strength of the upper domain was simply not comparable to that of the lower domain.

However, he took a look at his body, and sure enough, it was quite damaged, and even if he wanted to recover later, it would be difficult to recover completely.

And this is just refining once, if it is refined many times, the problem of the body will be even greater.

Perhaps most of the Sixth Realm present had already given up on advancement, and for them, physical damage would also be damaged, as long as it could bring benefits to the forces or families behind them.

After the refining is completed this time, the Sixth Realm will leave one after another, but there will be a second batch of Sixth Realm to continue to refine the top-level dimensional Tongbao.

......

Louver Chamber of Commerce.

Ye Tian came here to submit a task and buy the Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid. "Nine-Eighty-Zero"

Soon, I bought ten more bottles of Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid.

This time, he was not in a hurry to take on the task of refining the top-level dimensional Tongbao, after all, this task could not be canceled, this was the long-term business of the Baiye Chamber of Commerce, unless the Baiye Chamber of Commerce was destroyed.

Therefore, he waited until he had exhausted the Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid before taking on this task.

Besides, he still had to scrape together the funds, otherwise, he wouldn't have enough funds to buy the Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid in the later stage.

Time flies.

After a period of time, Ye Tian exhausted the Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid, and then continued to refine the top-level dimensional Tongbao.

In the years that followed, he participated in such missions again and again, and over time, he purchased a large amount of Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid.

Finally on this day.

Ye Tian's cultivation broke through.

Rumble!!!!

The late realm of the sixth realm has been reached!

However, at this time, he didn't take over the task of refining the top-level dimensional Tongbao from the Baiye Chamber of Commerce, after all, a fool knows that after refining the top-level dimensional Tongbao so many times in a row, there has already been a big problem with his body, and it is impossible to return it.

If you continue, you will really be suspicious.

So, he gave up on this task.

And if you want to ascend to the peak realm of the sixth realm from the late stage of the sixth realm, it is not something that can be done in a short time, even if it is the heavenly marrow gold liquid, you have to buy many bottles.

"Take your time!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Another long time has passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian's dimensional rules are finally about to be broken.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian successfully broke through and comprehended the rules of the ten dimensions, and his strength naturally skyrocketed.

And not long after, he created a multi-dimensional mastery of the six realms and a will mastery of the eleventh dimension, which also made his combat power skyrocket.

In the days that followed, he tried to create more multi-dimensional masteries, and only by creating more multi-dimensional masteries could it be easy to create the supreme mastery of the Six Realms and even the supreme mastery in the future.

......

Because Ye Tian was worried that he would be suspected by the Hundred Leaf Chamber of Commerce, he almost didn't take on the tasks of the Hundred Leaf Chamber of Commerce, but he was also inquiring about the news of some other forces, such as which forces had the Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid and were willing to trade the Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian heard about it, and directly used the Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid as a reward, not a purchase qualification.

【Purgatory Holy Sect】

This force is very powerful, although it is not as good as the Baiye Chamber of Commerce, but there are also more than a dozen existences in the seventh realm, and they occupy a special vein in the twelfth dimension - the Spell Spirit Gold Vein.

This kind of spell spirit gold contains a very terrifying destructive power, because this kind of metal material, and even the material for refining a special thing, the body of the ordinary Sixth Realm will be eroded in the ore vein, and the injury is almost irreversible.

And the higher the cultivation, the more serious the erosion.

In other words, the general Sixth Realm would not dare to enter this kind of vein mining.

However, the Purgatory Holy Sect sent many Fifth Realms to mine, and he couldn't even leave the veins until he died.

Of course.

Those Fifth Realms almost all sold their lives to the Purgatory Holy Sect or simply the Purgatory Holy Sect destroyed the small forces that offended them, and captured the Fifth Realm among those small forces, and sent them into the Spell Spirit Gold Vein to mine for the Purgatory Holy Sect.

Of course, the strength of the Fifth Realm was too weak, and the Spell Spirit Gold vein was extremely tough, and it was undoubtedly impossible to dig out a lot of Spell Spirit Gold.

Therefore, they also issued tasks to the outside world, seeking some sixth realms to mine.

As for the reward, it is naturally some special resource treasures, including the Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid.

Ye Tian felt that this task was okay, so he signed up, anyway, the task of the Purgatory Holy Sect, he did it for the first time, and it was impossible for this force to suspect him, and it would not come to investigate him0

According to the mission requirements of the Purgatory Holy Sect, 10,000 pieces of spell spirit gold can be exchanged for a bottle of Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid, and the number is not limited.

This shows the preciousness of the spell spirit gold.

Soon.

Ye Tian entered the twelfth dimension through the dimensional passage of the Purgatory Holy Sect, and directly came to the Spell Spirit Gold Vein.

Before he officially entered this vein, he sensed that a terrifying force was eroding his body, making his body gradually decay.

"What a terrible spell spirit gold vein!"

Ye Tian didn't expect that a mere vein could actually pose a threat to the Sixth Realm, and even threaten the Seventh Realm, after all, the higher the cultivation, the greater the impact.

It's just that I don't know if the Eighth Realm will be affected when I come here.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the ore vein, and he was really shocked by this ore vein.

This vein is so majestic and stretches that it seems to be as large as a small extradimensional territory.

Before entering the Spell Spirit Gold Vein, a Sixth Realm of the Purgatory Holy Sect reminded Ye Tian that he must not go deep into the depths of the vein, otherwise he would die, and he would be mined outside.

The Purgatory Holy Sect has opened up a lot of mining channels, and it is easier to mine in those passages, if you find a place to mine by yourself, it will be very labor-intensive 3.5, and it is not worth it.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian casually found a tunnel passage in a mine, went deep into it, and mined.

While!

Ye Tian tried to attack the mine, but the power was absorbed by the wall of the mine, and only a very small part of the power caused damage to the wall.

The material of the mine is very tough, leaving only tiny cracks.

"I didn't think that with the strength of my sixth realm, I didn't smash this place with a casual blow, so how can the fifth realm mine?"

Ye Tian was curious to perceive the mining methods of the other Fifth Realms, and the result surprised him.

These Fifth Realms seem to have cultivated a special kind of multi-dimensional mastery, grinding down the stones in the veins little by little, and then mining out a piece of Spell Spirit Gold Ore little by little.

It can be said that it will take a long time for them to mine a piece of Spell Gold Ore.
